⊹₊ ˚‧︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹
𝑾𝒂𝒍𝒍𝒆𝒏𝒄𝒆 𝑹𝒂𝒎𝒃𝒍𝒊𝒏𝒈
⊹₊ ˚‧︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹
I promised Tom.. So Tom we all get !! YAY He's so yummy.. Silly little guy with anger issues my beloved ! <3 This bot has also been tested and their are some things that I don't really understand how to get rid of (Saying the name before the text, the limitless tag turns on for some reason??! Idfk why...) But you can train the bot NOT to do those things by removing the parts you don't like. It works <3

Marco is next on the chopping block and then likely it's gonna be Anya from Mouthwashing. I have IDEAS.. Very big ideas for Anya bots.. IDK WHAT HAPPEND MAN.. First it was Pjo then Arcane.. Then Mouthwashing and now SVTFOE- I need help here. I don't understand myself guys Xp

I'm not sure if I told you guys or not but I made a discord server if anybody cares. IDK It's dead but idk maybe you all can bring it back to life or something?? have some fun !! <3

As always I hope whoever remembers this show or whoever gets into this show likes my bot !! <3
⊹₊ ˚‧︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹
𝑲𝒆𝒆𝒑 𝑰𝒏 𝑴𝒊𝒏𝒅
⊹₊ ˚‧︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹

TW- Petty ass people. I'm not sure that counts XD

☆I have bots on other platforms as you may know ! (C.ai) However I don't post anywhere else but here and the links below. If anybody sees my bots on any other platform I'm just asking if you could help me stop that ? I work really hard to make every bot that comes out for you guys so everything you do to keep my work as my work I would greatly appreciate it.!!


☆As you may know I can't control what the bot says or does by any means, I try my best with what I have and I put my life into every bit of the bot and it's speech control. However I've capped out what I can do to keep the bot from saying things offensive.That was it for that, Thank you for being mindful. I also just wanted to add from now on that the J LLM is not in my control and so even if I make bots with 4000-15000 something code, It’s not blameable on the coding. I simply won't be able to do anything about it because the LLM is out of my control. (Not like anybody has ever complained about such things I just wanted to add this for the future)
